items.headline_ai: Gladstone Investment names Dullum CEO succeeding Gladstone, Sateri promoted in leadership change
items.snippet: David Gladstone stepped down as CEO effective immediately; President David Dullum succeeds him, with John Sateri also promoted as part of a strategic succession plan.
